message:
Bump version to 0.1.26 for release

Release featuring premium UI theme overhaul:
- New sophisticated color palette (Tokyo Night inspired)
- Organized color constants with clear hierarchy
- Subtle agent-specific background tints
- Refined search bar with mode-aware styling
- Visual score indicators with dots (●●●●○)
- New helper widgets: themed_block, filter_chips, score_indicator
- Consistent design language across all UI elements

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

 edition = "2024"
 authors = ["Jeffrey Emanuel"]
 description = "Unified TUI search over local coding agent histories"
